channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Determining the Composition of Asteroids and Its Implications for Planetary Defence
item.description: Asteroids are remnants from the early Solar System, acting as time capsules that preserve the building blocks of planets. Understanding their composition is crucial not only for scientific curiosity b...

item.title: KP and Federal Govt Join Hands to Launch Peshawar Valley Railway Project
item.description: PESHAWAR: The Khyber Pakhtunkhwa (KP) government has announced its plan to collaborate with the federal government for the launch of the Peshawar Valley Railway line. This ambitious project aims to im...

item.title: NCW to Conduct Week-Long Public Hearings in 500 Districts to Address Women’s Complaints
item.description: The National Commission for Women (NCW), in coordination with state women’s commissions, is set to conduct a series of 'Mahila Jan Sunwais' or public hearings across India, spanning 500 districts in 2...

item.title: Thoughtful Mother’s Day gift ideas 2026: 82 curated suggestions from independent and sustainable brands
item.description: This comprehensive Guardian guide, published ahead of Mother’s Day on 15 March 2026, offers 82 carefully selected gift ideas suitable for mothers, grandmothers, aunts, mentors, and other maternal figu...

item.title: AI Liquid Biopsy Detects Early Liver Fibrosis and Cirrhosis Before Symptoms
item.description: Researchers at Johns Hopkins Kimmel Cancer Center have developed an AI-driven blood test capable of detecting early liver fibrosis and cirrhosis years before symptoms appear. The technology, called fr...

item.title: Realpolitik: Power Through Violence Shapes Global Order
item.description: Wanjiru Njoya writes that in international relations, raw power – especially capacity for violence – determines who calls the shots, not fancy doctrines or ideologies. Countries like the US, Russia, C...

item.title: Flavour N’abania: Life, Music Career, Achievements and Family

item.title: Trump removes Kristi Noem as Homeland Security Secretary amid controversy over shootings and budget
item.description: US President Donald Trump has dismissed Kristi Noem from her role as Homeland Security Secretary following a series of controversies, including the fatal shootings of two US citizens by federal office...

item.title: Artificial Intelligence Enables Mapping and Analysis of Deep-Sea Ecosystems
item.description: Beneath the North Atlantic, over a kilometre below the surface, cold-water coral reefs flourish on seamounts, often unknown and uncharted. These reefs are critical habitats for numerous species and ha...

item.title: ODM to Hold Special Delegates Convention Following Sifuna Leadership Dispute
item.description: The Orange Democratic Movement (ODM) in Kenya has announced a Special Delegates Convention set for Friday, March 27 in Nairobi, following internal disputes over the removal of Nairobi Senator Edwin Si...

item.title: Toronto Police Investigate Disappearance of 8-Year-Old Girl
item.description: Toronto police are actively searching for an 8-year-old girl who has gone missing in the city. Authorities are urging anyone with information to come forward to assist in the safe recovery of the chil...

item.title: Key Sectors for Women’s Economic Growth in Tanzania Vision 2050
item.description: In Tanzania, agriculture, manufacturing, and services are seen as main areas where women fit to get more jobs and business chances to help the country reach its Vision 2050 goals. Planning and Investm...

item.title: Trump calls for Iran’s full surrender as Israel escalates strikes in Beirut
item.description: US President Donald Trump has called for Iran’s 'unconditional surrender', a move that has dashed hopes of a diplomatic resolution and unsettled financial markets. The announcement came as Israel inte...

item.title: DPWH to Complete Taft Avenue Drainage Upgrades by 2027 to Reduce Flooding
item.description: The Department of Public Works and Highways (DPWH) is set to complete the drainage rehabilitation along Taft Avenue in Manila before the end of 2027, according to Secretary Vince Dizon. The project co...

item.title: University of Ilorin Teaching Hospital Faces Four-Month Water Shortage, Patients Rely on Sachet Water Amid Power Issues
item.description: For more than four months, University of Ilorin Teaching Hospital (UITH) in Kwara State don suffer serious water scarcity wey dey make life hard for patients and their families. Relatives of patients ...

item.title: Emefiele’s co-defendant tells court he lied in EFCC statement under threat
item.description: For Lagos State High Court, one Henry Omoile, wey be co-defendant for the alleged $4.5 billion fraud wey dey involve former CBN governor Godwin Emefiele, don admit sey e lie for the statement wey e gi...

item.title: Man accused of using multiple IDs in alleged Sh52.5 million cyber fraud case
item.description: A Nairobi court has charged a man accused of orchestrating a sophisticated cyber fraud scheme that allegedly caused a financial loss of about Sh52.5 million to a local technology and financial service...

item.title: Heavy rains cause road damage in Serengeti, Tanapa advises caution
item.description: The Tanzania National Parks Authority (Tanapa) has issued a warning to all visitors planning trips to the Serengeti National Park due to significant road damage caused by heavy rains across the countr...

item.title: Petrol scarcity hits Ibadan as prices reach N1,080 per litre, causing transport hike
item.description: Long long queues don start dey show for different filling stations for Ibadan, Oyo State, as pump price of petrol don shoot between N925 and N1,080 per litre. This price jump don make transport fares ...

item.title: Alexa Ilacad Opens Up About Her Drive to Excel in “Your Face Sounds Familiar”
